description: Vetted small local models the engine can download and run at tier zero (no server installed). llm → llama.cpp (llama-server, OpenAI-compat chat); stt → whisper.cpp (whisper-server). Tier zero is a CPU-friendly warm-up, not the real-time fast tier (an ~8B-class model + parakeet-class STT on a served runtime — see docs/model-support-matrix.md). Sizes are approximate; never auto-downloaded — a starter model is fetched only on an explicit click.

models.name: Qwen3 1.7B (Q4_K_M)
models.description: Current-generation, small and CPU-friendly — warms fast, the first-run default. Tier-zero warm-up, not the real-time fast tier. Apache-2.0, ungated.

models.name: Qwen3 4B (Q4_K_M)
models.description: A step up in quality for a little more memory. Still tier-zero — the recommended fast tier is an ~8B-class model on a served runtime. Apache-2.0, ungated.

models.name: Whisper base.en
models.description: Tiny English transcription on CPU — the tier-zero audio fallback. Slower than parakeet-class STT on a served runtime (the recommended real-time path).

models.name: Whisper small.en
models.description: More accurate English transcription for a larger download — still the CPU fallback, slower than parakeet-class STT on a served runtime.
